response:
Jamie was a former employee of Iliad Media Group. When the company transitioned to 100% employee-owned, Jamie was surprised and delighted. If Iliad Media Group had 200 employees, and each employee received an equal share of ownership, how many percent of the company did each employee own? Task

Each employee would own 5% of the company. The calculation is based on dividing 100% by 200 employees. This ensures equal distribution of ownership. Task

The final answer is 5%. Task

Task
